creator: bruce.richardson@intel.com
text:
Created attachment 155647
Patch file with changes to update DPDK port to 2.0 release

DPDK v2.0 was recently released. Attached is a diff of the changes needed to update the port from 1.8 to the new 2.0 release.

Main Changes:
* remove unneeded post-unzip command to remove a cpp flag, since this change has been pushed upstream
* remove unneeded patch for nic_uio.c since that change is included upstream
* update plist file with new file additions/removals in 2.0
